# Purpose

This file is the reusable kickoff template for starting a task.
It exists so humans and AI agents begin work with the same reading order, summary expectations, and implementation discipline.
AI agents should use this template before implementation work starts.

# Maintenance Instructions

Update this template when the team changes how tasks should be started or planned.
Humans or AI may update it.
This template should remain consistent with [docs/START_HERE.md](../START_HERE.md) and [docs/tasks.md](../tasks.md).

# TASK-<ID>-KICKOFF

## Read First

1. Read docs/START_HERE.md
2. Read docs/tasks.md
3. Read docs/design/design.md
4. Read only the relevant design subdocuments if they exist

## Summarize Before Coding

- Current project intent:
- Current phase:
- Task scope:
- Constraints:

## Plan Format

Produce a minimal, reviewable plan using short numbered steps.
Prefer the smallest viable implementation.
Do not bundle unrelated refactors.

## Diff Discipline

- Minimize diffs
- Preserve unrelated code
- Update docs after implementation if the task changes project truth
